title: Hochul admits she uses AI ‘lightly’ at the office — including to figure out NY gas prices
description: Gov. Kathy Hochul admitted Thursday that she uses artificial intelligence “lightly” at the office -- including to figure out how high New York's gas prices are.
content:

title: Your ID on the Blockchain Can Fight Tinder Fakes
description: Machines have finally passed the Turing Test, the mid-century thought experiment designed to see if a computer could fool us into thinking it was human. In an evaluation last year, 73% of respondents thought they’d just had a five-minute conversation with a real person when they had been talking to an artificial-intelligence model.

title: Val Kilmer to star from beyond
description: A year after the actor's death, a generative AI version of Val Kilmer will co-star in an independent film, in one of the boldest uses yet of artificial intelligence in moviemaking.
content:

description: Oppenheimer sees artificial intelligence driving a "blue-collar renaissance" as automation threatens to replace office jobs and boost physical trades.
